fields.summary: Security Defect: Resolve Transitive Dependencies in NotificationService
fields.description:
h1. 🚨 SECURITY COMPLIANCE DEVIATION DETECTED

The automated CI/CD pipeline blocked deployment of *NotificationService* (APP-009) due to a security compliance threshold breach.

* *Assigned Risk Score:* 100.0/100 (Threshold: 50.0)
* *Pipeline Action:* DEPLOYMENT GATE BLOCKED

h3. 🔍 Detected Transitive Risk Paths:
1. *CVE-2026-1050* (CVSS: 6.1) -> Attack Vector: `APP-009 -> mocha -> micrometer-core`
2. *CVE-2026-1050* (CVSS: 6.1) -> Attack Vector: `APP-009 -> sharp -> node-fetch -> micrometer-core`
3. *CVE-2026-1050* (CVSS: 6.1) -> Attack Vector: `APP-009 -> multer -> node-fetch -> micrometer-core`

h3. 🛠️ Auto-Assigned Mitigations:
* Run a dependency tree isolation sweep.
* Replace/upgrade affected transitive components to latest non-vulnerable versions.
* Run `python pipeline.py` locally to re-verify compliance status.
